elkAddress.title: Elk M1 IP Address
elkAddress.description: The IP address of the Elk M1 panel (M1XEP interface).

elkPort.title: Elk M1 Port
elkPort.description: The port number used to connect to the Elk M1 panel.

keypadCode.title: Keypad Code
keypadCode.description: The user code used to arm/disarm the panel.

zoneTypes.title: Zone Types
zoneTypes.description: Define the type of each zone to expose in HomeKit.

garageDoors.title: Garage Doors
garageDoors.description: Define garage door zones and outputs.

stateZone.title: State Zone
stateZone.description: Zone number that indicates door open/closed.

openOutput.title: Open Output
openOutput.description: Output number to open the door.

closeOutput.title: Close Output
closeOutput.description: Output number to close the door.

includedTasks.title: Included Tasks
includedTasks.description: List of task numbers to expose in HomeKit.

includedOutputs.title: Included Outputs
includedOutputs.description: List of output numbers to expose in HomeKit.

logElkData.title: Log Raw Elk Data
logElkData.description: Enable logging of raw data received from Elk M1.
